question: Allometric growth is
option1: Increase in the number of cells with growth of individual cells
option2: Growth due to multiplication of constituent cells at a constant rate
option3: Different in the rate of growth of different parts of the body
option4: Growth due to special reserve cells of the body
remarks: Correct answer is "Different in the rate of growth of different parts of the body"
